description: Discovery reduces risk before committing to delivery. These discovery tracks test whether a potential solution is valuable, viable, usable, and feasible.

riskFramework.question: Will customers buy the product and/or choose to use it?
Will the solution meet the needs of the business?
Can customers figure out how to use it?
Can we build it within given resources and constraints?

items.title: Sustainability & Ingredient Impact Scorecards: Operations / Production Manager discovery
items.name: Sustainability & Ingredient Impact Scorecards: Operations / Production Manager discovery
items.summary: Discovery work for Sustainability & Ingredient Impact Scorecards is reducing uncertainty before delivery investment by testing demand, business fit, usability, and buildability for Operations / Production Manager.
items.opportunity: Clarify whether stronger ingredient & nutrient data model and scenario engine (what-if workspace) create enough customer and business value to justify further delivery across web, Impact Factors API.

linkedInitiatives.description: Sustainability & Ingredient Impact Scorecards initiative focused on improving ingredient & nutrient data model, scenario engine (what-if workspace), strengthening customer value for Operations / Production Manager, and evolving delivery across web, Impact Factors API.

assignments.how: Leads the discovery framing, customer learning plan, and recommendation for how Sustainability & Ingredient Impact Scorecards should prove value for Operations / Production Manager.
Supports the discovery with workflow detail, prototype feedback, and evidence on ingredient & nutrient data model and scenario engine (what-if workspace).
Supports the discovery with workflow detail, prototype feedback, and evidence on ingredient & nutrient data model and scenario engine (what-if workspace).
Supports the discovery with workflow detail, prototype feedback, and evidence on ingredient & nutrient data model and scenario engine (what-if workspace).

riskFocus.question: Will customers buy the product and/or choose to use it?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Operations / Production Manager will choose Sustainability & Ingredient Impact Scorecards because ingredient & nutrient data model and scenario engine (what-if workspace) solve a high-friction workflow.
evidenceToCollect: Whether Operations / Production Manager describes ingredient & nutrient data model as a top priority problem.
Whether concept tests show intent to adopt or pay for the improved Sustainability & Ingredient Impact Scorecards experience.

riskFocus.question: Will the solution meet the needs of the business?
riskFocus.hypothesis: The business can justify investment in Sustainability & Ingredient Impact Scorecards if ingredient & nutrient data model and scenario engine (what-if workspace) improve target KPIs without creating unacceptable operating cost.
evidenceToCollect: What commercial, compliance, or operational constraints affect the Sustainability & Ingredient Impact Scorecards case.
Which KPI movement would make the solution worth funding.

riskFocus.question: Can customers figure out how to use it?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Operations / Production Manager can understand and complete the core Sustainability & Ingredient Impact Scorecards workflow with minimal guidance.
evidenceToCollect: Where users hesitate or need explanation in prototypes covering ingredient & nutrient data model and scenario engine (what-if workspace).
Whether the workflow language, navigation, and sequencing are clear enough for first-time use.

riskFocus.question: Can we build it within given resources and constraints?
riskFocus.hypothesis: The teams can deliver the smallest useful version of Sustainability & Ingredient Impact Scorecards within current technology, staffing, and dependency constraints.
evidenceToCollect: Which architecture, integration, or data constraints sit behind ingredient & nutrient data model and scenario engine (what-if workspace).
Whether delivery can be sliced into a realistic first release.

plannedActivities: Interview target users from the Operations / Production Manager segment about current workflow pain and willingness to switch.
Prototype and test the end-to-end journey covering ingredient & nutrient data model and scenario engine (what-if workspace).
Run a business and delivery review to define the smallest viable slice across web, Impact Factors API.
items.decisionToMake: Decide whether to proceed, narrow, or stop further investment in this Sustainability & Ingredient Impact Scorecards opportunity.
